function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Resending invoice from 2026-03-20
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2026-03-20 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound file was written once as required; checklist status from written content: attachment path was previously read, single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email, no forwarded quoted text required, and no YAML colon-space quoting hazard present in values. Proceeding to inbox cleanup per workflow.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox item, created outbound reply draft, deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft outbound email resend to Claudia with the requested 2026-03-20 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system, used process-next-inbox-item + processing-inbox-email + sending-email workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email in cast, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request from claudia@helios-tax.example matched canonical primary_contact_email in /10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and requested invoice date/counterparty matched /50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md. Outbound record was created in /60_outbox/outbox/ and inbox item was then deleted per workflow.
